notes: This release keeps the original release-hub repository structure while making the local package Windows-only for now.
The launcher now includes Backup local data and Backup and check updates again.
The launcher starts Streamlit in headless mode and reuses the existing local port to avoid opening two app windows.
User data and exports now default to Documents\Pathmark\00_System rather than the Downloads folder.
Export folders are grouped as Tasklists, Google Calendar Exports, Google Tasks Exports, and Backups.
Pathmark detects existing top-level folders in the selected Pathmark folder and uses them as Areas.
